name: Maasai Shuka Blanket with Blue Fleece Lining- Medium
description: Key Features & Design Authentic Maasai Patterning: Showcases bold geometric designs and vibrant colors that honor the rich cultural heritage of the Maasai people. Soft Blue Fleece Lining: The plush, insulating interior provides exceptional warmth and comfort perfect for chilly evenings or for pets who love to snuggle. Versatile Functionality: Ideal as a pet bed blanket, sofa throw, decorative accent, or a cozy wrap for lounging at home. Durable & Easy to Maintain: Made from high-quality, long-lasting materials. The fleece is a washable machine, wrinkle-resistant, and designed for everyday use. Medium Size: Generously sized to support multiple uses, offering ample space for relaxation, warmth, and comfort. Benefits of the Fleece Lining Exceptional Insulation: Keeps users or pets warm throughout all seasons. Soft & Cozy Texture: Provides a soothing, comfortable surface for resting or sleeping. Breathable & Moisture-Wicking: Helps regulate body temperature and prevents overheating, ensuring all-day comfort. Lightweight & Portable: Easy to fold, carry, and transport—perfect for travel, outdoor activities, or picnics. Low Maintenance: Designed to stay fresh and clean with minimal effort, thanks to its durable, easy-care construction.
